vocab.meaning: sự hiện diện ở khắp mọi nơi
vocab.example: E-commerce platforms have a ubiquitous presence in Vietnam, as almost everyone now prefers shopping online for convenience.
Educational websites have started to proliferate since the digital transformation era began, offering flexible learning for students.

vocab.meaning: trang web tổng hợp tin tức
vocab.example: News aggregators are immensely popular among the older generation who want to stay updated on current affairs from multiple sources.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra
vocab.example: Platforms centered around user-generated content, like video-sharing sites, dominate the daily internet usage of Vietnamese youth.

vocab.meaning: cổng thông tin/trang web công nghệ tài chính
vocab.example: With the rise of cashless payments, fintech portals and digital banking websites have become an integral part of our daily lives.

vocab.meaning: sự gia tăng đột biến về độ phổ biến
vocab.example: Remote working tools and professional networking sites saw a massive surge in popularity over the last few years.

vocab.meaning: cộng đồng trực tuyến sôi nổi
vocab.example: Forum-based websites host a vibrant online community where people exchange tips on everything from cooking to coding.

vocab.meaning: hợp lý hóa/đơn giản hóa các công việc hàng ngày
vocab.example: Governmental websites that streamline daily tasks, such as paying utility bills or renewing licenses, are gaining traction.

vocab.meaning: các trang web dành cho sở thích ngách
vocab.example: In addition to giants like Facebook, many people spend time on niche interest sites dedicated to sustainable living or indie gaming.

vocab.meaning: các cửa hàng kỹ thuật số (trang web bán hàng)
vocab.example: Most traditional retailers in my country have now established digital storefronts to reach a wider audience nationwide.
